title.en: The Supreme Path — Ye Tian Sweeps All Highnesses

content.es:
«¿Alguien más quiere desafiarme? ¡Que suba!»

Ye Tian se mantuvo firme con el sable en mano, irradiando una arrogancia aplastante.

¡Swish!

Otro Su Alteza entró en escena: era Su Alteza Shenhuan, cuya fuerza superaba con creces a la de Su Alteza Wangyue, y además dominaba las artes de la ilusión; había cultivado incluso un Poder Divino de ilusión. Los Hijos del Universo de nivel pico del tercer rango en general preferían no cruzarse con Su Alteza Shenhuan, pues este los sometía con facilidad. Una vez atrapado en el Poder Divino de ilusión, si no se lograba romperlo y la propia defensa era algo inferior, la derrota —o incluso la caída— era inevitable de un solo golpe.

En cuanto Su Alteza Shenhuan subió al campo de combate, desplegó de inmediato su Poder Divino de ilusión: ¡Reino Divino Onírico!

¡¡¡¡BOOM!!!!

Ye Tian quedó envuelto al instante en el Reino Divino Onírico, sumergido en la ilusión de Su Alteza Shenhuan.

Sin embargo, en ese momento Ye Tian activó el Ojo del Vacío Espiritual... pero no logró penetrar aquel Poder Divino de ilusión.

«Interesante. Parece que aún le falta nivel a mi Ojo del Vacío Espiritual. Pero aunque seas un Hijo del Universo de nivel pico del tercer rango, no del primero, puede que me inspire cierta precaución... Sin embargo, ¡tú eres solo el tercer rango!»

Ye Tian activó el Poder Divino del Ídolo Espacial, y una aura de poder aterrador estalló desde su interior.

¡¡¡CRAC!!!

El Reino Divino Onírico se desmoronó bajo la fuerza colosal de Ye Tian. La fuerza bruta, llevada a cierto umbral, destroza incluso las ilusiones: era el principio de dominar las diez mil leyes mediante la pura potencia.

Al romperse el Reino Divino Onírico, Su Alteza Shenhuan se quedó atónito. Antes de que pudiera reaccionar, la punta de un sable le atravesó el cuerpo.

¡Un golpe, y derrotado al instante! Su Alteza Shenhuan también cayó. A partir de entonces, varios Su Alteza intentaron desafiar a Ye Tian uno tras otro, pero todos fueron vencidos. Incluso los más excéntricos en talento apenas lograron resistir el primer golpe; al segundo, caían inevitablemente.

La poderosa fuerza de Ye Tian superó todas las expectativas de los Su Alteza presentes.

Finalmente, un Su Alteza de nivel pico del segundo rango hizo su aparición.

«¡Su Alteza Cihun!»

Ye Tian observó al Su Alteza que tenía frente a él: era, sin duda, uno de los cinco Su Alteza del Lago Bibo.

«Su Alteza Diez Mil Leyes, ¡vengo a desafiarte!»

Su Alteza Cihun declaró con gravedad.

«Adelante.»

Ye Tian respondió.

En verdad, Su Alteza Cihun no tenía la menor confianza, pero debía actuar: necesitaba tantear la verdadera fuerza de Ye Tian para darle a Su Alteza Shengtian alguna oportunidad de victoria. De lo contrario, si todos los Su Alteza de la zona amarilla caían barridos uno a uno, el bochorno sería mayúsculo.

¡Swish!

Su Alteza Cihun se hizo invisible. Era un Talento de Invisibilidad supremo, potenciado además con una técnica secreta de ocultamiento especial que lo complementaba a la perfección. Empleado en medio de un combate, aunque el rival pudiera detectarlo, cualquier descuido bastaba para que él tomara la iniciativa.

«Ocultarse ante alguien con un Talento de Espacio Arcano... ¡qué ridículo!»

Ye Tian entró de inmediato en el estado de invisibilidad espacial, una ocultación aún más absoluta que cualquier Talento de Invisibilidad convencional.

En realidad, no necesitaba ocultarse. Pero quería vencer al rival en su propio terreno de mayor fortaleza, pues así el ímpetu acumulado sería aún más poderoso.

Una vez invisible, Ye Tian rastreó la posición de Su Alteza Cihun con su Talento de Ojo de Perspicacia y acto seguido ejecutó la técnica de palma de nivel superDivino, la Palma Xumi, golpeándolo desde la distancia.

¡¡¡TRUENO!!!

Su Alteza Cihun salió despedido desde el vacío, con heridas graves por todo el cuerpo.

En ese instante, el sable de Ye Tian descendió en un tajo letal que eliminó a Su Alteza Cihun.

«¡¡¡Su Alteza Cihun ha caído!!!»

Todos los Su Alteza presentes se quedaron con los ojos muy abiertos. Su Alteza Cihun era un Hijo del Universo de nivel pico del segundo rango, ¡y cayó con igual rapidez! La diferencia de fuerza era abismal.

«Su Alteza Diez Mil Leyes es definitivamente un Hijo del Universo de nivel pico del primer rango. Quizás solo Su Alteza Shengtian tenga alguna esperanza de vencerlo.»

Comentó un Su Alteza.

«Su Alteza Fenglong, ve a tantear la fuerza de Su Alteza Diez Mil Leyes.»

Su Alteza Shengtian le transmitió el mensaje a Su Alteza Fenglong.

Su Alteza Fenglong asintió. Su fuerza superaba un poco a la de Su Alteza Cihun, y además su capacidad defensiva era formidable; a diferencia de Su Alteza Cihun, que se especializaba únicamente en el arte del asesinato y era fácil de neutralizar una vez identificada su estrategia, Fenglong era más difícil de abatir.

¡Swish!

Su Alteza Fenglong entró al campo. Dominaba los Poderes Divinos del viento: al subir, activó de inmediato un Poder Divino de viento defensivo y luego desplegó su Poder Divino de ataque cumbre: ¡el Poder Divino del Dragón de Viento!

¡¡¡¡ESTRUENDO!!!!

Un enorme dragón de viento que se extendía decenas de miles de li se lanzó hacia Ye Tian, como si fuera un dragón verdadero; sus garras aterradoras arañaron el aire, como si fueran a desgarrar el cielo y la tierra.

«¡Cortar!»

Ye Tian ejecutó la técnica de sable de nivel Sin Superior en su estado de Consumación, el Arte del Sable del Corazón Vacío, y de un tajo destrozó el Poder Divino del Dragón de Viento, lanzándose directamente hacia Su Alteza Fenglong.

Ese tajo rompió completamente la defensa de Su Alteza Fenglong, pero este poseía un Talento de Regeneración de nivel Divino y un Talento de Vida, por lo que logró absorber el daño a duras penas.

«Una técnica de sable de nivel Sin Superior en estado de Consumación... ¡realmente es de una potencia incomparable!»

Su Alteza Fenglong no pudo evitar reconocerlo.

¡Swish!

Ye Tian se teletransportó; su velocidad era demasiado abrumadora.

Su Alteza Fenglong se fusionó con las leyes del viento, intentando esquivar el ataque de Ye Tian. Pero el sable, como un fantasma, penetró en el interior de las leyes del viento y partió a Su Alteza Fenglong en dos.

Golpe tras golpe de sable: por muchos medios de supervivencia que poseyera Su Alteza Fenglong, al final también cayó. Tras su derrota, regresó al mundo ilusorio y se colocó junto a Su Alteza Shengtian.

«Su Alteza Shengtian, no logré tantear la verdadera fuerza de Su Alteza Diez Mil Leyes. Es muy poderoso; definitivamente no es inferior a ti.»

Su Alteza Fenglong declaró con suma gravedad.

«Yo seguiré tanteando. Total... ¡si pierdo, no hay gran pérdida!»

Su Alteza Wuying se adelantó.

Su Alteza Wuying entró al campo y combatió contra Ye Tian. No obstante, fue derrotado en muy poco tiempo.

Luego subió Su Alteza Yunqiong, que igualmente cayó pronto.

Con esto, casi todos los Su Alteza poderosos de la zona amarilla del Salón Supremo de la Raza Humana, a excepción de Su Alteza Shengtian, habían caído.

Tras vencer a tantos Su Alteza, el ímpetu de Ye Tian se condensó hasta alcanzar un nivel supremo, y su corazón del sable iba acercándose poco a poco a la Consumación. ¡Su camino supremo estaba a punto de completarse!

«¡Solo falta uno!»

Ye Tian miró a Su Alteza Shengtian.

Su Alteza Shengtian era el Su Alteza más poderoso de la zona amarilla. Desde que los tres Su Alteza de Nivel Eterno cayeron, nadie había podido sacudir su posición. Incluso había quien afirmaba que en el futuro Su Alteza Shengtian tendría posibilidades de alcanzar el poder de combate de Nivel Eterno al llegar al Nivel Emperador; su renombre era extraordinario.

Aunque Ye Tian era poderoso, mientras no derrotara a Su Alteza Shengtian, no podría ser llamado el más fuerte de la zona amarilla.

«Su Alteza Diez Mil Leyes, permíteme ser tu último oponente.»

Su Alteza Shengtian dio un paso al frente y se plantó ante Ye Tian, declarando con voz grave.

Ye Tian llevaba tiempo esperando este momento. Y Su Alteza Shengtian también lo había estado esperando a él: bien podría haber sido el primero en desafiarlo, pero no lo hizo; esperó a que Ye Tian condensara su ímpetu al máximo antes de enfrentarlo. Aunque él no seguía el camino supremo, si lograba derrotar a Ye Tian, su propio ímpetu también alcanzaría un límite extremo, lo que beneficiaría enormemente a su propio Dao. Quizás aprovecharía esta ocasión para, con ese ímpetu llevado al extremo, dar el paso definitivo y trazar su propio camino.

Si ganaba, superaría el pico de un solo salto. Si perdía, simplemente entraría en un período de silencio; no había nada que perder.

¡Para Su Alteza Shengtian, este combate era un beneficio puro sin ningún perjuicio! En el enorme campo de batalla, el combate entre Ye Tian y Su Alteza Shengtian estaba a punto de comenzar; todos los Su Alteza observaban con los ojos fijos en esa contienda.

Todos sentían gran curiosidad: entre Ye Tian y Su Alteza Shengtian, ¿quién era más fuerte?

«Su Alteza Diez Mil Leyes, tu talento es el más poderoso que he visto en todos los Su Alteza que conozco; ni siquiera los tres Su Alteza de Nivel Eterno de antaño se acercaban a tu velocidad de crecimiento. Pero llevas demasiado poco tiempo en el Salón Supremo de la Raza Humana; superarme podría resultarte algo difícil todavía. Si esperaras unas décadas más, quizás yo no sería rival para ti.»

Su Alteza Shengtian elogió a Ye Tian, pero al mismo tiempo insinuó que aún no era su igual; con esas palabras aumentó su propio ímpetu sin ofender a Ye Tian.

Pero a Ye Tian le traía sin cuidado lo que dijera Su Alteza Shengtian. En su mente solo había un pensamiento:

¡Derrotar a Su Alteza Shengtian!

«¡Combatamos!»

Ye Tian declaró con frialdad.

«¡Bien!»

Su Alteza Shengtian asintió.

¡¡¡¡ESTRUENDO!!!!

¡Los dos cruzaron el primer golpe!

«¡Espada del Cielo Sagrado, ¡desciende!»

Una espada colosal cayó desde los cielos, sellando decenas de millones de li a la redonda. Ese golpe era suficiente para herir gravemente a cualquier Hijo del Universo de nivel pico del segundo rango. Pero Ye Tian activó el Poder Divino del Ídolo Espacial y recibió la Espada del Cielo Sagrado con una sola mano.

Al instante, el espacio se fragmentó y una onda de choque aterradora barrió decenas de millones de li.

Tras ese primer intercambio, Ye Tian y Su Alteza Shengtian estaban en igualdad.

«¡Cien millones de fulgores de espada!»

Su Alteza Shengtian agitó la mano y la gran espada se transformó en cien millones de destellos que cubrieron cielos y tierra, sellando innumerables espacios. Aunque Ye Tian se sumergiera en el espacio, los destellos de espada seguirían penetrando hasta alcanzarlo.

Era una técnica de espada de nivel Sin Superior de segundo rango, y Su Alteza Shengtian la había cultivado hasta la Consumación.

En ese preciso momento, Ye Tian desplegó otro Poder Divino espacial: ¡el Dominio de los Diez Mil Reinos!

¡¡¡BOOM BOOM BOOM!!!

Una tras otra, capas de barreras nacieron y encerraron los cien millones de destellos de espada en miles de ellas, aislando incluso a Ye Tian y a Su Alteza Shengtian dentro de una misma capa.

«¡Presión de los Mil Reinos!»

«¡Confinamiento espacial, congela!»

«¡Arte del Sable del Corazón Vacío, ¡taja!»

Ye Tian desplegó una técnica tras otra para atacar a Su Alteza Shengtian. Por supuesto, Su Alteza Shengtian también contaba con numerosos medios defensivos y fue resistiendo y respondiendo a cada ataque de Ye Tian.

Ninguno lograba imponerse al otro, y los Su Alteza de alrededor lo presenciaban con enorme emoción.

De repente, Su Alteza Shengtian realizó sellos con ambas manos y su figura entera se transformó en una colosal imagen sagrada, con dos alas brotando a su espalda; parecía una divinidad suprema de luz celestial.

«¡Es el Canon Divino Sagrado que ha cultivado Su Alteza Shengtian! Se dice que es un Canon Divino de gran poder, apenas inferior al más supremo de todos los Cánones Divinos; según los rumores, ya lo ha cultivado hasta la Gran Perfección y puede manifestar el Cuerpo Divino Sagrado, con un poder de combate que se dispara de forma descomunal!»

Exclamó Su Alteza Yunqiong.

Los demás Su Alteza mostraron semblantes tensos: que Su Alteza Shengtian desplegara el Cuerpo Divino Sagrado significaba que el combate había llegado a su momento más crítico.
content.en:
"Whoever else wants to challenge me, come up!"

Ye Tian stood with a knife in his hand and said domineeringly.

Swish!

Another His Highness entered, it was His Royal Highness of Divine Illusion, whose strength was much stronger than His Highness Mochizuki, and he was proficient in illusion, and even cultivated an illusion supernatural power.

The ordinary third-grade peak-level son of the universe didn't even want to meet His Divine Highness, because it was easy to be restrained by him.

Once you fall into the illusion power, if you can't break the illusion, if your own defense is a little worse, you will definitely be seriously injured by a blow, or even fall.

The Divine Illusion Hall came on the field and directly cast the illusion magic power - the Dream God Realm!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian was suddenly shrouded in the Fantasy God Realm and entered the illusion of the Divine Illusion Palace.

However, at this time, Ye Tian opened the Void Eye, but he did not see through this illusion supernatural power.

"Interesting, it seems that my Void Eye level is still a little worse, but if you are a first-grade peak-level cosmic child, I may be afraid of it, but you are only a third-grade pinnacle-level cosmic child!"

Ye Tian turned on the Spatial Idol Divine Power, and the terrifying power burst out.

Click!!

The Dream God Realm was directly shattered under Ye Tian's powerful power.

Break ten thousand laws with strength, and when the power reaches a certain level, the illusion will also crumble.

As soon as the Fantasy God Realm shattered, His Highness the Divine Illusion was shocked, and before he could react next, the tip of a knife passed through his body.

It's another knife second!

His Royal Highness was also defeated!

Next, all His Highnesses tried to challenge Ye Tian, but they failed one after another, even if the Highnesses with strange talents could only block one move at most, and they would lose the second move.

Ye Tian's strength was beyond the expectations of all His Highnesses.

Finally, a second-grade pinnacle-level son of the universe appeared.

"His Highness the Soul Thorn!"

Ye Tian looked at the highness standing in front of him, who was one of the five highnesses of Bibo Lake.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I'm here to challenge you!"

His Royal Highness the Assassin said solemnly.

"Please!"

Ye Tian said.

In fact, His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul didn't have any confidence, but he had to make a move, he had to test Ye Tian's strength in order to increase the hope of victory for His Highness the Holy Heaven, otherwise all the Highnesses in the yellow-level area would be swept away by Ye Tian, and they would really lose face.

Swish!

His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul is invisible, this is a top-level stealth talent, and he has practiced a special stealth secret technique with a stealth talent, and the effect of stealth is very good.

If such a method is used in the process of duel, even if the enemy can perceive it, once it is slightly negligent, it is equivalent to taking the lead.

"It's ridiculous to be invisible in front of an arcane-level spatial talent!"

Ye Tian also immediately entered the state of spatial invisibility, which was more thorough than the invisibility of the stealth talent.

He doesn't really need to be stealthy, but he wants to beat the opponent in what he does best, so that the increase will be stronger.

Ye Tian, who had entered the state of spatial invisibility, used the Eye of Insight talent to gain insight into the traces of His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul, and immediately used the super god-level palm technique Void Palm, and hit His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul in the air.

Boom!!

His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul flew upside down from the void, and his injuries were not light.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian's sword slashed and directly killed His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul.

"His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul has been defeated!!"

All the Highnesses present were amazed.

His Royal Highness the Soul Assassin is a second-grade peak-level son of the universe, and he was defeated so quickly, the gap in strength is too big!

"His Highness Wanfa is definitely a first-grade peak-level son of the universe, I'm afraid that only His Highness the Holy Heaven can hope to defeat the other party!" one of His Highnesses sighed.

"Your Highness the Wind Dragon, go and try the strength of His Highness Wanfa!"

His Highness the Holy Heaven transmitted the message to His Highness the Wind Dragon.

His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon nodded, his strength was slightly stronger than His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul, and his defense was very strong, unlike His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul, who only specialized in assassination techniques, once he was targeted by the enemy, it was easy to rush into the street.

Swish!

His Highness the Wind Dragon is on the field.

He is proficient in the wind system, and as soon as he enters the field, he opens the defensive wind system, and then uses the top offensive wind system power, the wind dragon power!!

Bang!!!!

A huge wind dragon that stretched for thousands of miles rushed towards Ye Tian, just like a real wind dragon, and its terrifying claws grabbed it at once, as if it was about to shatter this piece of heaven and earth.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian performed the Perfection-level Unsurpassed Sword Technique Wuxin Divine Knife Technique, smashed the Wind Dragon Divine Power with one sword, and went straight to His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon.

This sword directly broke through the defenses of His Highness the Wind Dragon, but His Highness the Wind Dragon had a god-level healing talent and a life talent, so he resisted the damage.

"The perfection-level unsurpassed sword technique is really powerful!"

His Royal Highness Wind Dragon had to admit.

Swish!

Ye Tian teleported over, the speed was too fast.

His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon merged into the Law of the Wind and prepared to dodge Ye Tian's attack.

And the ghostly sword actually slashed into the law of the wind at once, cutting His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon into two.

Under the attack of a sword, His Highness Fenglong, no matter how many means he had to save his life, he was defeated in the end!

After His Highness the Wind Dragon was defeated, he re-entered the illusory world and stood by His Highness the Holy Heaven.

"His Highness the Holy Heaven, I can't test the strength of His Highness Wanfa, he is very strong, definitely not weaker than you!" His Highness the Wind Dragon said with great solemnity.

"I continue to try, and there is nothing to lose if I lose anyway!"

His Highness Shadowless stood up and said.

His Highness Shadowless came on the field and fought with Ye Tian.

However, soon, His Highness Shadowless was defeated.

Then, His Royal Highness Yun Qiong came on the field, and he was also defeated quickly.

At this point, in the yellow-level area of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, except for His Highness the Holy Heaven, almost all the other powerful Highnesses were defeated.

After defeating so many highnesses, Ye Tian's momentum condensed to a top level, and the supreme sword heart gradually became consummated.

His supreme path is about to take shape!

"One person missing!"

Ye Tian looked at His Highness the Holy Heaven.

His Royal Highness the Holy Heaven was the most powerful in the previous Yellow Rank Region, and since the fall of the three Eternal Rank Sons of the Universe, no one could shake His Highness the Holy Heaven.

Some people even asserted that His Highness the Holy Heaven was expected to achieve the combat power of the Eternal Universe at the emperor level in the future, and his reputation was very loud.

Although Ye Tian was strong, as long as he didn't defeat His Highness the Holy Heaven for a day, he couldn't be called the strongest in the yellow-level region.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I'll be your last opponent!"

The Holy Heaven Temple stepped out next, walked in front of Ye Tian, and said in a deep voice.

Ye Tian was waiting for this moment, why wasn't he?

He could have challenged Ye Tian as the first opponent, but he didn't, but waited for Ye Tian to gather the strongest momentum and then challenge Ye Tian.

Although he is not walking the path of supreme strength, if he defeats Ye Tian, his own momentum will also reach a limit, which will also be of great help to his Dao, maybe he can take advantage of this opportunity to reach the limit of the momentum to get out of his own path in one fell swoop.

If you win, you will surpass the peak in one fell swoop.

If you lose, then it's just a quiet period of time, and it's nothing.

For His Highness the Holy Heaven, this battle will be beneficial and harmless!

In the huge battle world, the battle between Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven was about to begin, and all His Highnesses were watching this battle.

They were also very curious, who was stronger and who was weaker between Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven?

"Your Highness Wanfa, your talent is the strongest among any of the Highnesses I have ever seen, even the three Eternal Highnesses at the beginning, their growth speed is far inferior to yours. But your time to join the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race is too short, and it may be difficult to surpass me, if you are in a few decades, I may really not be your opponent!"

His Highness Shengtian not only praised Ye Tian, but also threatened that Ye Tian was not as good as him, so that his words would not only increase his momentum, but would not offend Ye Tian.

It's just that Ye Tian doesn't care about what His Highness Shengtian says at all, he only has one thought now.

Defeat His Highness the Holy Heavens!

"Let's fight!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Good!"

His Highness nodded.

Bang!!!!

The two have fought each other!

"Holy Heavenly Sword!"

A giant sword fell from the sky and sealed thousands of miles.

This blow was enough to severely damage any second-grade peak-level cosmic child, but Ye Tian turned on the Spatial Idol Divine Power and greeted the Holy Heavenly Sword with one hand.

Suddenly, the space shattered, and a terrifying shock wave swept thousands of miles.

After the first blow, Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven were evenly matched.

"Billions of sword light!"

With a wave of his hand, the giant sword turned into hundreds of millions of sword light and enveloped the heavens and the earth, blocking countless spaces.

Even if Ye Tian escaped into the space, the sword light could still penetrate through.

This is a supreme sword technique, and it has been cultivated to the perfection level by His Highness the Holy Heaven.

At this moment, Ye Tian cast another spatial supernatural power-

The !! of the Ten Thousand Realms

Boom Boom Boom !!!

A heavy enchantment was born, isolating hundreds of millions of sword lights into thousands of enchantments, and even isolating Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven into one of the enchantments.

"Thousand Realms Suppression!"

"Space confinement, condensation!"

"Heartless Divine Knife Technique, Slash!"

Ye Tian used a gate method to attack His Highness the Holy Heaven.

Of course.

His Holy Heaven His Highness also had a lot of defensive means, and they met and resisted Ye Tian's attack one by one.

The two of them were not up or down, so that the highnesses around them watched it with relish.

Suddenly.

His Royal Highness cast his handprints with both hands, and the whole person turned into a giant statue, with wings behind it, like a holy supreme deity.

"It is the Holy Light Divine Canon cultivated by His Royal Highness the Holy Heaven, this is a powerful Divine Canon second only to the Supreme Divine Canon, it is rumored that he has cultivated this Divine Canon to the Dacheng realm, and he can use the Holy Light Divine Body, and his power has skyrocketed!"

His Royal Highness Yun Qiong exclaimed.

The other Highnesses were solemn, and His Highness the Holy Heaven cast the Holy Light Divine Body, which was equivalent to fighting to the most critical moment.
